lanes.name: Domain admin emergency access
lanes.narrative: Emergency domain-admin sessions carry high blast radius but still have review, recording, and stale-account gaps.
lanes.nextAction: Review all emergency sessions, refresh MFA evidence, and remove stale accounts before the next risk committee packet.

lanes.name: Database administrator rotation
lanes.narrative: Database admin sessions are usable but need tighter command anomaly and termination evidence.
lanes.nextAction: Attach command-review evidence and verify terminated-user account removal.

lanes.name: Cloud break-glass operators
lanes.narrative: Cloud break-glass sessions have current controls and only need watch conditions.
lanes.nextAction: Keep monthly session review and MFA freshness evidence attached.

lanes.name: Finance systems privilege
lanes.narrative: Finance privileged sessions are controlled with strong owner, recording, and termination evidence.
lanes.nextAction: Maintain quarter-close privileged session review cadence.
